core_mechanism: superposition coding with successive interference cancellation: additively layering multiple independent signals onto one shared channel and decoding them in order of strength, subtracting each decoded component from the received mixture before decoding the residual
brief_reason: The abstract superimposes an extra data symbol on the distributed access-point signals and uses successive interference cancellation at the receiver to decode both symbols in sequence, i.e. additive layering followed by ordered decode-and-subtract.
